description: Display an image from a URL, base64 data URL, or signable storage path.

src.description: Image URL, base64 data URL, or signable storage path (e.g., "s3://bucket/image.png")

objectFit.description: How the image fits its container

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "opacity: 0.8; border-radius: 8px")
